resources.string: Opening the right screen for this device.
Premium IPTV for the living room
Lean back into live channels, catch-up viewing, movies, and series with a first-party Android TV experience.
Fast live browsing with remote-first focus
Large-library movies and series without the clutter
Unified player overlays, guide access, and saved content
Swap providers, refresh metadata, or add a new source.
No channels found in this category
Try another category or search term.
Add channels to favorites to see them here
Watch a few live channels to build a recent list here
Scan live categories quickly, keep navigation deterministic, and surface only the schedule data that matters on screen.
In Pro mode, first click previews the stream and second click opens full playback.
Press OK again to open this channel
D-pad moves the selected channel. Save the order when you are done.
Add channels to Favorites or a saved group to populate this rail.
Start playback on a few channels and they will appear here.
Favorite a channel or add it to a custom live group to pin it here.
Are you sure you want to delete \'%1$s\'? This will remove all channels from this group.
%1$s is active. Jump back into live, catch up on progress, or browse fresh additions.
Favorites, recent channels, and last group.
Set up a provider to unlock the home screen
Add a playlist or Xtream source first. Once a provider is active, Home will surface favorite channels, continue watching, and fresh library rows.
Try a different category or return to the full library shelves to surface more titles.
Curated shelves, saved groups, and full-library browsing without leaving the current provider context.
Jump into the dedicated search surface without losing your current browse state.
A movie group with that name already exists
Favorite a movie or add it to a custom group to see it here.
Refine the selected movie category without rebuilding the whole library.
Surface favorites, in-progress, top-rated, and fresh movies across the whole library.
Use the remote to move posters, then save the shelf order for this group.
%1$d titles available in the current provider
Try another category or return to the full library to surface more series shelves.
Editorial shelves, saved groups, and paged series browsing tuned for large provider libraries.
Open the command search view to find titles, episodes, or saved groups faster.
A series group with that name already exists
Favorite a series or add it to a custom group to see it here.
Pivot between saved, in-progress, updated, and highly rated series.
Surface favorites, in-progress, top-rated, and fresh series across the whole library.
Use the remote to move posters, then save the shelf order for this group.
Hold a saved group for options
Search by category name, then open the matching shelf.
Switch, sync, edit, and troubleshoot your IPTV sources.
Select a provider to view details and actions.
Protect adult or sensitive content with TV-friendly controls.
Lock or unlock categories for the active provider.
Tune decoder and buffering behavior for smoother playback.
Choose how the Live TV browser should present channels and whether it should preview before playback.
Run a quick download test and use the result to pick stable playback quality limits.
Estimated on %1$s at %2$s because the active network did not complete the download probe.
Applied the recommended Wi-Fi quality cap.
Applied the recommended Ethernet quality cap.
Larger rows with direct single-click playback.
Denser channel list with direct single-click playback.
Dense channel list plus embedded preview and EPG. First click previews, second click plays.
Version, build, and support details for this installation.
Please wait while your playlist is imported.
HIDDEN - Content hidden from all lists
Choose the app language without leaving the TV interface.
Export or import favorites, groups, and preferences.
Backup version %1$d detected. Choose what to import before making changes.
Review your provider, protection, and playback setup at a glance.
Add a provider to unlock playback, guide data, and the rest of the TV experience.
Manage local live DVR jobs, storage, and scheduled captures.
Storage ready for local live recording
Storage is not writable for recording
Start a manual recording from live playback or schedule one from the player.
Long-press on any channel, movie, or series to build your saved library
Pick up unfinished movies and series from the saved hub.
Jump back into recently watched live channels with one click.
Narrow the hub to the content you want to revisit.
Jump between watch-next, live recall, type-focused, and custom-group views.
Filter the saved hub to %1$s or broaden it across every provider already loaded in the app.
Keep Saved focused on the active provider
Browse saved items across every imported provider
Live favorites that are eligible for the Home dashboard
Tailored from your recent picks on %1$s
Open a group or hold it for merge, delete, reorder, and Home priority actions.
Switch between manual order, recent activity, and title browsing.
Use your saved and group order
Shortcut directly to the saved group or system section you need.
Pinned favorites, custom groups, and recent progress in one premium hub.
Guide filters, schedule density, and focused program detail in one remote-first surface.
Review protected live, movie, and series groups without leaving the premium settings shell.
Find channels, movies, and series without leaving the TV flow.
Start with a title, keyword, channel name, or series. Results stay grouped for fast remote navigation.
Type at least 2 characters to search
Add or activate a provider before searching the library.
Use Xtream or M3U. You can change it later.
Choose a source, enter the details, and continue. You can manage it later from Settings.
Use Xtream when credentials are available
Best when you have server, user, and password.
Use M3U for URL or file-based playlists
Use a playlist link or import a local file.
Refresh, edit, or replace it later from Settings.
Could not import playlist file. Please try again.
Storage is full. Free up space and try importing again.
Stream unavailable — check your internet connection
Stream not found or access denied
Unable to play this format — try changing decoder mode in Settings
DRM license or device security requirements prevented playback
Retry, jump back to the last channel, or press Back to leave playback.
Select a channel to tune instantly. Back closes the list.
Browse upcoming programs here. Select an archive-ready item to start catch-up.
Recording needs a valid live channel context.
Do you want to resume %1$s from where you left off?
Jump back to the last live group you were browsing.
Unable to load the TV guide right now.
Add or activate a provider to view the TV guide.
Search titles in the current guide window...
Switch between broad browsing, anchor-time browsing, and archive-friendly rows.
Keep the guide on all channels or your live favorites only.
Stay on your pinned live channels
Only channels airing at the current guide anchor
Channels with catch-up or archive entries
Choose how much guide detail fits on screen.
Hide channels with no guide data
Guide data available on %1$d of %2$d channels
Guide data looks incomplete or stale for this selection.
Try again or switch to another category.
No channels found in this guide category
No channels with guide data in this selection
No matching programs in this guide window
Try another title, broaden the category, or clear the search.
Turn off Scheduled only or switch to another category.
Choose another category or refresh the guide.
Archive or catch-up playback should be available for this program.
This provider supports catch-up for the channel, but this program is not marked archive-ready in the current guide window.
Archive playback is not available for this channel.
Guide data looks stale, so replay availability may be incomplete until the guide refreshes.
This channel is not flagged as archive-ready by the provider.
Replay may fail because the provider exposed catch-up support without a usable replay template.
Replay may fail because the provider did not expose a replay stream identifier.
Replay metadata is present, but the provider may still reject this specific program window.
Guide freshness is low, so replay mapping may still be incomplete until the guide refreshes.
No channels in slots yet.\nLong-press a channel to add it.
Review the active slots, replace any stream, and launch when ready.
Select a slot to place this channel.
Use Live TV favorites or recent channels first so replacement choices appear here.
Memory pressure is high. Extra slots stay in standby until playback stabilizes.
Manage watch history and incognito mode.
Don\'t save watch history or recently visited categories while active.
Wipe all watch progress and recents for all providers.
This will permanently delete all watch history, continue watching progress, and last visited categories across all providers.
Failed to load channels. Please check your connection and try again.
